# qmd (opendatalab/MinerU-Document-Explorer) — retrieval/chunking/deep-read MCP daemon.
# MINERU-AII-INTEGRATION-SPEC-001 §3 Track A. Zero GPU: CPU-only hybrid retrieval
# (BM25 + built-in embeddinggemma-300M vector search), no VLM parsing here.
#
# R2 (red line): no MINERU_API_KEY, no mineru-open-sdk — local-only parsing fallback
# (pymupdf) is intentional, not an oversight.
FROM node:24-trixie-slim

# Outbound proxy for npm registry + first-run embeddinggemma-300M model pull.
# Matches deploy/docker-compose.yml's sing-box gateway pattern.
ARG HTTP_PROXY=http://172.19.0.1:10808
ARG HTTPS_PROXY=http://172.19.0.1:10808
ENV HTTP_PROXY=${HTTP_PROXY} \
    HTTPS_PROXY=${HTTPS_PROXY} \
    http_proxy=${HTTP_PROXY} \
    https_proxy=${HTTPS_PROXY} \
    NODE_USE_ENV_PROXY=1

RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 python3-pip curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN npm install -g mineru-document-explorer
RUN pip install --break-system-packages --no-cache-dir pymupdf python-docx python-pptx

COPY doc-reading.json /root/.config/qmd/doc-reading.json
COPY qmd-entrypoint.sh /usr/local/bin/qmd-entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/qmd-entrypoint.sh

EXPOSE 8181
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --retries=3 --start-period=30s \
    CMD curl -sf http://localhost:8181/mcp -o /dev/null || exit 1

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/qmd-entrypoint.sh"]
